sections.title: Getting Started
sections.goal: Help users choose the correct portal, sign in, reset passwords, and understand redirect behavior.

pages.label: Portal Selector
pages.goal: Choose the correct portal before logging in.
steps: Choose CGroup Access, Security Guard, Janitor, or Admin Login.
Continue to the matching login form.
warnings: Use the correct portal for your role.

pages.label: Staff Login
pages.goal: Sign in from the correct staff portal.
warnings: The Janitor portal labels the first field as Employee ID, but the same sign-in flow is used.

pages.label: Admin Login
pages.goal: Sign in to the admin portal with an admin account.
warnings: Non-admin accounts are denied access and signed out.

pages.label: Forgot Password
pages.goal: Reset the password for the correct portal account.
steps: Finish password recovery from the email link.
warnings: Use the reset page that matches the portal you normally use.

sections.title: Onboarding
sections.goal: Guide first-time users through account setup, profile creation, document upload, and signature submission.

pages.label: Employee Onboarding
pages.goal: Create or complete the employee profile.
warnings: If email confirmation is pending, the user must confirm first and then continue.

sections.title: Guard / Employee Guide
sections.goal: Explain the shared employee-style dashboard used by Security Guard, Janitor, and CGroup Access staff.

pages.label: Dashboard
pages.goal: Review profile, assignment, feedback, and recent submissions.
steps: Check assignment details and summary cards.
Review recent admin feedback and submissions.

pages.label: Documents
pages.goal: Review requirements and upload replacements when needed.
steps: Upload a replacement if the file needs action.
warnings: Signature updates can use drawing or image upload.

pages.label: Submit DTR
pages.goal: Upload a DTR image for a selected cutoff.

pages.label: Messages
pages.goal: Use updates and direct chat with supervisor or admin fallback.
steps: Use Updates to review status notices.
Use Chat to send an instant message.
warnings: Message connection states may show Live, Reconnecting..., or Sync issue.

pages.label: Notifications and More
pages.goal: Open notifications, manage profile requests, refresh the dashboard, and sign out.
steps: Open the bell icon for notifications.
Submit or update a profile edit request.
warnings: Profile changes do not go live until admin approval.

sections.title: Supervisor Guide
sections.goal: Explain supervisor scope, team review work, team messaging, and settings.

pages.label: Supervisor Dashboard
pages.goal: Review scope, metrics, team preview, and recent DTR activity.
steps: Review Team Preview and recent DTR activity.
Use quick actions to open team tools.
warnings: The supervisor dashboard needs an assigned area to load scope data.

pages.label: Team DTR
pages.goal: Review team submissions and submit DTR files for team members.
steps: Use Submit Team DTR for multi-member submission.
warnings: Bulk team submission can skip existing cutoff rows.

pages.label: Supervisor Messages
pages.goal: Reply to guard threads and resolve conversations.

pages.label: Team Directory
pages.goal: View team members, presence, assignment, and schedule.
steps: Search by name, ID, branch, or position.
warnings: The directory uses supervisor scope and may be empty if assignment data is missing.

pages.label: Supervisor Settings
pages.goal: Update personal profile details and access help tools.
steps: Upload a profile photo if needed.
Use Send Reset Email for password help.
warnings: Area and branch scope are controlled by admin.

sections.title: Admin Guide
sections.goal: Explain the admin dashboard, review queues, messages, reports, settings, and notifications.

pages.label: Admin Dashboard
pages.goal: Review quick actions, metrics, activity, and notifications.
steps: Open related queues from activity panels.

pages.label: DTR Submissions
pages.goal: Review employee DTR rows and apply single or bulk status changes.

pages.label: Requirements
pages.goal: Review document and signature uploads.
steps: Mark it Verified or Needs Reupload.

pages.label: Users
pages.goal: Manage people, assignment scope, roles, and profile change requests.
steps: Review the Profile Change Request Queue.
Open assignment editor for scope changes.
warnings: Role and assignment changes affect routing and supervisor visibility.

pages.label: Messages
pages.goal: Reply to escalated threads and admin fallback conversations.

pages.label: Reports
pages.goal: Review DTR analytics and submission trends.
steps: Review the last 7 days submission trend.

pages.label: Settings
pages.goal: Maintain admin profile settings and dashboard alert preferences.
steps: Mute or enable realtime alert sounds.

sections.title: Troubleshooting
sections.goal: Help users recover from access problems, missing data, onboarding delays, review delays, and messaging sync issues.

pages.label: Access and Routing Issues
pages.goal: Explain access denied, onboarding redirects, and role-based routing.
steps: Confirm the correct portal is being used.
Check whether the account has a profile record.
Verify admin role before using the admin portal.

pages.label: Onboarding and Review Delays
pages.goal: Explain pending email confirmation and review statuses.
steps: Check email for confirmation if signup is pending.
Review remarks and notifications for next actions.
warnings: Pending Review and Needs Reupload are normal workflow states.

pages.label: Messaging Recovery
pages.goal: Explain chat connection states and recovery behavior.
steps: Use Sync now if the recovery action appears.
warnings: Live is normal; Reconnecting... and Sync issue indicate recovery states.
